title: JSON Object to CSV
scenario: Convert a given JSON object to a CSV string. The target output should be a comma-separated string with each key-value pair on a new line.
constraints: Must handle arrays as individual rows

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated CSV adheres to the constraints of handling arrays as individual rows and using commas as separators.
Check if the generated CSV has a correct header row.
Check if the generated CSV is syntactically valid.
